name: Summerville, South Carolina

rent.notes: Summerville is significantly cheaper than nearby Charleston. Water/sewage/trash typically separate.
rent.gigInternetNotes: Home Telecom provides true FTTH to ~24% of Summerville at up to 1Gbps symmetric. AT&T covers 86% but mix of fiber/DSL. Overall fiber availability 58-72% depending on source. Fiber concentrated in newer developments.

groceries.notes: Below national average. Publix, Lidl, Walmart Neighborhood Market, and Harris Teeter available. No sales tax on groceries in SC.

electricity.notes: Berkeley Electric Cooperative or Dominion Energy. A/C heavy May-Sep ($180-240). Mild winter heating ($80-110).

gas.notes: Piedmont Natural Gas or SCE&G. Minimal needs — cooking, water heater. Some homes all-electric.

water.notes: Summerville Commissioners of Public Works. 2-adult household.

sewage.notes: Billed with water. Dorchester County Water and Sewer.

trash.notes: Dorchester County Solid Waste. Curbside pickup.

utilities.taxes: South Carolina has no sales tax on residential utilities for seniors 65+ (homestead exemption).
utilities.notes: Electricity (heating+cooling), gas, water, sewage, trash. Internet is in entertainment.

healthcare.notes: Medicare Part B ($174.70/mo) + Medigap Plan G (~$200/mo x2 people) + Part D (~$45/mo x2) + dental/vision plans. Higher premiums reflect macular degeneration specialist coverage and frequent monitoring needs.

petCare.notes: Affordable vet care. Multiple clinics in Summerville/Ladson area.

petDaycare.notes: Doggy daycare 2 days/week, large breed rate (~$40/day). Camp Bow Wow Summerville, Happy Tails.

petGrooming.notes: Bernese coat maintenance, professional grooming monthly.

transportation.notes: Car-dependent. CARTA bus service limited. Gas prices moderate. Low insurance rates. 30-min drive to Charleston.

entertainment.notes: Incl cable+1Gig internet, Netflix, Amazon Prime, Apple TV+, dining out. Close to Charleston for nightlife/culture.

phoneCell.notes: T-Mobile 55+ Essentials. 2 phones. SC wireless tax ~7%.

miscellaneous.notes: Low misc costs. Free parking everywhere. No tolls in area.

buffer.notes: Monthly safety buffer for unexpected expenses

medicalOOP.notes: Anti-VEGF injections for macular degeneration (~$300-400 OOP each, 6-10x/yr after Medicare 80%). Specialist visits: ophthalmologist q6-8wks, endocrinologist 2-4x/yr, cardiologist 1-2x/yr. Frequent labs: lipid panel, TSH, A1C, CMP 3-4x/yr each. Both adults: PCP visits quarterly.

medicine.notes: Monthly prescription medication costs for household

taxes.notes: Estimated monthly income tax on $72,000/yr household income. Based on jurisdiction's effective retiree rate; excludes sales/VAT/property tax.

healthcarePreMedicare.notes: ACA silver benchmark for 2-adult household both age ~60, before subsidies. County-level estimate (Dorchester County, SC). Charleston metro SC — BlueCross BlueShield SC dominant. Estimated ±15% vs healthcare.gov quote — verify for a specific ZIP before relying on the number.

stateIncomeTax.exemptions: SC exempts up to $10,000 in retirement income for 65+. SS fully exempt from SC tax.

salesTax.notes: Dorchester County 8% (6% state + 2% local). Groceries taxed at 0% (unprepared food exempt in SC).

propertyTax.notes: Renters: no direct property tax. SC property tax moderate (~0.55% effective rate). Homestead exemption for 65+ on first $50K.

taxes.notes: SC income tax capped at 6.5%. SS fully exempt. $10K retirement income deduction for 65+. No sales tax on groceries.

healthcare.notes: Summerville Medical Center (Roper St. Francis). MUSC (Medical University of SC) 30 min in Charleston — nationally ranked teaching hospital. Trident Medical Center in North Charleston.

acaMarketplace.notes: Charleston metro SC — BlueCross BlueShield SC dominant.
acaMarketplace.disclaimer: Estimated ±15% vs healthcare.gov quote — verify for a specific ZIP before relying on the number.

lifestyle.notes: Azalea Park, Sawmill Branch Trail. 'Flowertown in the Pines' — charming Southern small-town feel. 30 min to Charleston beaches and downtown. Moderate pace of life.

pros: SS fully exempt from state tax

cons.text: Flood insurance may be needed in some areas
Safety & crime: see cited reports for current figures by city and country
